source_metadata.title: 2024/11/14 - Petitions
source_metadata.description:
14 November 2024 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Holly Brooker: Mandate Internet Service Providers to block rape, bestiality and slavery porn

Submitters

Holly Brooker

Department of Internal Affairs
- Nick Law, Policy Manager, Media Content & Online Safety
- Jared Mullen, Director, Digital Safety
- John Michael, Deputy Director Operations, Digital Safety

Classification Office
- Caroline Flora, Chief Censor
- Rupert Ablett-Hampson, Deputy Chief Censor

Internet Service Providers Association of New Zealand
- David Haynes, Chief Executive
